articles.title: Birthday Girl Mirra Andreeva Fights Off Nerves to Reach Her First Madrid Final!
articles.summary: Just a day after turning 19, Mirra Andreeva saved set points in a tense tiebreak to beat Hailey Baptiste. She’s now the second-youngest finalist ever in Madrid, and she’ll face Marta Kostyuk on Saturday.

articles.title: The Woman Behind Your Favorite Pop Songs Just Won a Huge Award!
articles.summary: Amy Allen, who co-wrote Sabrina Carpenter’s “Manchild” and “Tears” as well as “APT.” by Rosé and Bruno Mars, was named Songwriter of the Year at the ASCAP Pop Awards. Laufey also got a special award for her creative voice.

articles.title: Chef Jon Kung’s Kitchen Secrets: A Fridge Covered in Stickers and a Dream Rice Cooker
articles.summary: Chef Jon Kung, with over 2 million followers, shares their favorite kitchen gear—from a SMEG fridge covered in punk stickers to a wish for a rice cooker that washes rice. They also reveal why you should always wash your rice (bug eggs!).
